title: HIVE Digital Bitcoin Holdings Treasury Analysis
text: HIVE Digital Technologies Bitcoin Holdings tracker shows the company ended calendar year 2024 with a record Bitcoin HODL of 2,805 Bitcoin valued at over $260 million, representing a 263% year-over-year increase from $72 million of Bitcoin on their balance sheet at the end of December 2023. HIVE's Bitcoin strategy is anchored in a disciplined HODL philosophy, where the company retains a substantial portion of its mined Bitcoin as a long-term treasury asset, reflecting a firm belief in Bitcoin's potential as a store of value and as a hedge against inflation. According to Darcy Daubaras, CFO of HIVE Digital, the company continues to focus on a conservation strategy for Bitcoin (HODL), with the goal to retain a significant portion of the mined BTC to benefit in the event of an increase in their value. Hive applies a hybrid treasury model, where some Bitcoin is sold daily to cover operating costs, while at other times the firm capitalizes on low equity capital costs to hold its Bitcoin.
